title: Mai Potta Kannala Lyrics Album
stanzas: <div>Mai Potta Kannala Lyrics Album

Mai pota kannaala
katti izhuthu poraale.
ava pogum paadhaiyila
usura kondu poraale.

enakkaaga porandhavalae
nee yaen adi ennavittu pona.
unakkaga naan kaathirundhen
adhu therinjumaa pona.

en kannukulla ne vandhu
eppa nulanja.
unna paartha piragu
adi naanum tholanjen.

un kannu imaiya nee
konjam kasakkayila
en mayakkam konjam
theliyudhadi

nee pogum padhai
engum usuru poguthadi.
naan kaththum polambal
saththam unakku
kaekkuthaadi.

adi maiya potu
enna kavuththuputta.
ena manasa odachi
adi kizhichuputta.

adi vera yaarum illa
unna pola
naan vaazha poren
un nenappaala.

Mai pota kannaala
katti izhuthu poraale.
ava pogum paadhaiyila
usura kondu poraale.

enakkaaga porandhavalae
nee yaen adi ennavittu pona.
unakkaga naan kaathirundhen
adhu therinjumaa pona.

un kannu imaiya nee
konjam kasakkayila
en mayakkam konjam
theliyudhadi

nee pogum padhai
engum usuru poguthadi.
naan kaththum polambal
saththam unakku
kaekkuthaadi.

adi maiya potu
enna kavuththuputta.
ena manasa odachi
adi kizhichuputta.

adi vera yaarum illa
unna pola
naan vaazha poren
un nenappaala.

andru oru kaalaiyila
kanna naanum paakkayila
thanni alli kudichen.
en manasa konjam
thavikka vachcha.
thavikka vachcha
nenjula thaagam
innum theerala.
enna venaamunu solli
pogaatha pulla.
unnidathaile kadhal endrum
varamaatten.
natpendrum vendum
endrum kaetkamatten.

manadhil vandha
valigalum una nenachaa
pogume.
en nenjam vittu pogume.

indru valigal tharum
undhan ninaivil
nenjam valikkudhu
azhugudhu unnathaane
marakkave ninaikkuthu
marakkaama thavikkudhu
mai pota kannaal
enna neeyum vaatturiye
manasa konjam pootturiye
vaartha thaane kaetten penne
padhil pesaama
kollaatha pulla
enna kollaatha pulla

Mai pota kannaala
katti izhuthu poraale.
ava pogum paadhaiyila
usura konduthaane poraale.

en kannukulla ne vandhu
eppa nulanja.
unna paartha piragu
adi naanum tholanjen.

un kannu imaiya nee
konjam kasakkayila
en mayakkam konjam
theliyudhadi

nee pogum padhai
engum usuru poguthadi.
naan kaththum polambal
saththam unakku
kaekkuthaadi.

Mai pota kannaala
katti izhuthu poraale.
ava pogum paadhaiyila
usura kondu poraale.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses feelings of longing and love, reflecting on moments shared with a loved one.

In which movie is this song featured?

The movie context is currently unknown.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Dheeran and Surendran EJ.

When was the song released?

The song was released on September 16, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Mai Potta Kannala' beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and longing, making it a poignant piece for romantic moments. The lyrics reflect a deep yearning for connection, as the singer reminisces about cherished memories with a loved one. The melodic composition enhances the heartfelt sentiments conveyed in the song. Overall, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and emotional depth, making it relatable for anyone who has experienced love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mai Potta Kannala is a beautifully crafted melody that captures the essence of longing and romance. The unique collaboration between singers Dheeran and Surendran EJ brings a heartfelt vibe that resonates deeply with listeners. This song is sure to evoke emotions and memories, making it a perfect addition to any romantic playlist.
stanzaMeanings: With your eyes closed, you are going away. On the path you take, you are going with a heavy heart.
Why did you leave me, the one who was born for you? I was waiting for you, did you not know that?
When did you come into my eyes? After seeing you, I too lost my way.
Your eyes are like a dream, you are a little bit teasing, my confusion is becoming clearer.
The path you take is filled with sorrow. My cries are like a sound that you cannot hear.
You have taken away my heart, breaking it into pieces. My mind is restless and shattered.
There is no one else like you, I will live for you, only for your memory.
With your eyes closed, you are going away. On the path you take, you are going with a heavy heart.
Why did you leave me, the one who was born for you? I was waiting for you, did you not know that?
Your eyes are like a dream, you are a little bit teasing, my confusion is becoming clearer.
The path you take is filled with sorrow. My cries are like a sound that you cannot hear.
You have taken away my heart, breaking it into pieces. My mind is restless and shattered.
There is no one else like you, I will live for you, only for your memory.

Once, in the morning, I saw you and drank water. My heart was a little troubled. The thirst in my heart is still not quenched. Don't say you don't want me. I won't ask for love from you. I won't ask for anything else.
The thoughts that come to my mind will fade away when I think of you. My heart will let go of everything.

Today, the thoughts you give me make my heart ache. I can't forget you, my heart is still thirsty for you. With your closed eyes, you are taking away my heart, and I am asking for words without speaking. I am not asking for anything from you.
With your eyes closed, you are going away. On the path you take, you are going with a heavy heart.
When did you come into my eyes? After seeing you, I too lost my way.
Your eyes are like a dream, you are a little bit teasing, my confusion is becoming clearer.
The path you take is filled with sorrow. My cries are like a sound that you cannot hear.
